bird.name: Hawaiʻi ʻamakihi
bird.summary: The Hawaiʻi ʻamakihi (Chlorodrepanis virens), also known as the common ʻamakihi, is a species of Hawaiian honeycreeper. Taxonomy The Hawaiʻ…

locations.name: 拉奈島
locations.summary: 拉奈島（夏威夷語：Lānaʻi，發音：[laːˈnɐʔi, naːˈnɐʔi]；英語：Lanai，/lɑːˈnaɪ, ləˈnɑːi/)是夏威夷群島的第六大島，也是其中有公共交通可達的最小的有人定居的島嶼。由於過去它有著全島範圍的鳳梨種植…

relations.subject: Hawaiʻi ʻamakihi
relations.evidence: Accessed 18 May 2012. It formerly occurred on Lānai where it was last seen in 1976. It is one of the most common honeycreepers, inhabiting all types of habitat, dry māmane forests to mesic and wet forests, on the islands at elevations from sea level to
